bugs.summary: The patch weakens workflow bundle path containment for controlSchema files.
bugs.impact: A relative ../ controlSchema path can pass validation and read schemas outside the workflow bundle, violating bundle isolation.
acceptableFixes: Restore the AND condition so children must neither start with .. nor be absolute.
Add a path traversal regression for output.controlSchema.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.
Relying on git history instead of the sanitized workspace and proposed patch.
Assuming every holdout task contains a seeded bug.

difficulty.rationale: A one-operator containment regression with security implications.

approvedBy: repro.sh RED/GREEN or no-op revert check
approval.notes: Local blind holdout locked before calibration runs; provider review pending before promotion to primary release gate.
